data.body:
## Description
validate-issues.sh line 35 crashes with TypeError: 'int' object is not subscriptable when processing tickets whose created_at field is an integer timestamp (epoch seconds) rather than an ISO string.

## Reproduction
Run: .claude/scripts/dso validate-issues.sh --quick --terse

## Root Cause
The inline Python code does ts = created[:19].replace('T', ' ') which assumes created_at is a string. The event-sourced ticket system stores created_at as an integer (Unix epoch).

## Fix
Convert int to string before slicing: if isinstance(created, int): ts = str(datetime.fromtimestamp(created)) else: ts = created[:19].replace('T', ' ')
